steps.title: Select the needed table rows
steps.content: The question asks for employees with $16$ or more complete years. From the table, those are the $16$ to $18$ years row and the $19$ to $21$ years row.

steps.title: Add the two counts
steps.content: The table shows $10$ employees in the first row and $3$ employees in the second: $$ 10+3=13 $$ The answer is B.
